purpose: Catch a separate cloud Codex Nova Creature project up to the proven v049-v055 architecture without referencing or controlling any Windows laptop folder.
rules: Apply to the current cloud repo/project root only.
Create backups before overwriting same-name files.
If no .pt checkpoint exists in the cloud project, create brain-slot configs and placeholder notices instead of failing the whole architecture setup.
Keep the cloud project separate from the local laptop version.

architecture_steps.v055: gradient fine-tune trainer skeleton using torch when available
